verse.name: V1
verse.lines: I have heard of a land, On the far away strand, Tis' a beautiful home of a soul; Built by Jesus on high, There we never shall die, Tis' a land where, We never grow old.

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: Never grow old, Never grow old, In a land where, We never grow old. Never grow old, Never grow old, In a land where, We never grow old.

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: In that beautiful home, Where we'll never more roam, We shall be in, That sweet by and by; Happy praise to the king, Through eternity sing, Tis' a land where, We never shall die.

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: When our work here is done, And the life crown is won, And our troubles and trials are over; All our sorrow will end, And our voices will blend, With the loved ones, Who've gone on before.
